exercises.prompt: Compré el libro y ___ leí en un fin de semana. Which pronoun replaces 'el libro'?
Find and fix the mistake — a direct, unnatural translation from English word order:
exercises.incorrectSentence: Veo la todos los días en el parque.
exercises.correctSentence: La veo todos los días en el parque.

exercises.prompt: Put the words in the correct order:
Rewrite as an affirmative command, attaching the pronoun (don't forget the accent):
exercises.instruction: make it an affirmative tú command with the pronoun attached

exercises.prompt: Match each subject to its direct object pronoun:
Find and fix the laísmo mistake (non-standard even in Spain):
Fill in the blanks with the correct direct object pronoun:
exercises.passage: Tenía dos entradas para el concierto. Mi hermano me {0} pidió primero, así que se {1} di a él.
